title: Chicken Manti with Indian Twist
description: A fusion of Indian spices and Turkish manti, this dish is a flavorful and exotic take on traditional chicken manti. The combination of spices and herbs adds a unique twist to this popular Turkish dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the cumin powder, coriander powder, garam masala, and salt.
Add the chopped onion, grated ginger, and minced garlic to the bowl and mix well.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and toss them in the spice mixture until they are evenly coated.
Brush the chicken drumsticks with ghee or vegetable oil and place them on a baking sheet.
Bake the chicken in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until it is cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the manti dough according to the package instructions.
Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it into bite-sized pieces.
To assemble the manti, place a spoonful of the chicken mixture onto the center of a manti dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a triangle and press the edges together to seal the manti.
Repeat with the remaining dough and chicken mixture.
Serve the manti hot with your favorite chutney or raita.
